---
name: Agent task
about: Small, reviewable task card for Copilot, Codex, or another coding agent
title: "[task] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Summary
What single thing should be implemented?

## Why this task exists
Why is it needed for the current milestone?

## Current milestone
Which milestone in `MILESTONE_PLAN.md` does this belong to?

## Read first
- [ ] PROJECT_BRIEF.md
- [ ] ARCHITECTURE.md
- [ ] EXPERIMENT_PROTOCOL.md
- [ ] AGENTS.md
- [ ] CODE_REVIEW.md

## Scope
What is in scope for this task?

## Out of scope
What must not be changed in this task?

## Allowed files
List the only files/directories that may be changed.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Validation
What checks or manual steps should be run?

## Manual environment notes
Anything about laptop/phone/ADB/hardware that the agent must not assume?

## Reviewer focus
What should the reviewer look at first?

## Recommended tool
Which tool should handle this task first?
